criminal-ip-micro-asm
#
Performs a micro ASM-style summary for a domain with a completed Full Scan.
Base Command
#
criminal-ip-micro-asm
Input

!criminal-ip-micro-asm scan_id=xyz789abc123 domain=example.com
Resources
#

outputs.description: Domain analyzed. CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.scan_id Scan ID used for Micro ASM.
outputs.name: CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.domain

outputs.description: Domain creation date. CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.report_time Report generation time.
outputs.name: CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.created

outputs.description: Critical abuse record count. CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.abuse_dangerous Dangerous abuse record count.
outputs.name: CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.abuse_critical

outputs.description: Whether fake HTTPS detected. CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.punycode Whether punycode detected.
outputs.name: CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.fake_https

outputs.description: Certificate expiration date. CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.connected_ips Connected IP addresses (comma-separated).
outputs.name: CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.cert_valid_to

outputs.description: SSL vulnerabilities detected. CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.readable_output Pre-formatted Micro ASM report (email-ready).
outputs.name: CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.ssl_vulns

outputs.description: Full raw response from CriminalIP API. Example
outputs.name: CriminalIP.Micro_ASM.raw
